site.name: Vertex PMO
site.tagline: Unified project governance for professional-services SMBs

footer.hours: Support Monday to Friday · 9 AM to 6 PM (ET)
footer.tagline: The PMO SaaS that makes project profitability visible.

hero.eyebrow: PMO SaaS · Built for professional-services SMBs
hero.subtitle: Vertex surfaces project profitability in real time — no spreadsheets, no retroactive data entry, no end-of-month surprises.
hero.trust_line: Used by 120 professional-services SMBs in Quebec · ISO 27001 · Canadian hosting

demo.aria_label: Animated demonstration: project profitability dashboard filling live (To plan, In progress, Delivered columns — cards advance automatically)
demo.caption_subtitle: Three projects, three statuses, an average margin that refreshes every 3 seconds.

kpi.margin_note: across the 47 tracked projects this quarter

problem.title: Your projects are losing money without you noticing.
problem.body: Unbilled hours slip into spreadsheets, overruns surface at final review, unprofitable clients keep looking profitable in your head. On average, one project in three comes out negative — and nobody knows which one until it is too late.
problem.proof_caption: of professional-services projects lose money without ever being identified as such (OPEX Quebec study, 2025).

f1.title: Unbilled hours
f1.body: Teams track in three different tools. Project managers recover 8 to 12 hours per week that never made it onto an invoice.

f2.title: Invisible overrun
f2.body: Budget is reviewed once a month, at best. By the time the alarm rings, the overrun is already consumed.

f3.title: Persistent toxic client
f3.body: Without margin-by-client visibility, a large account that makes you lose 5% per project still looks like a large account. So you keep it.

howItWorks.title: Three steps. Not ten. No 90-day implementation.
howItWorks.subtitle: Vertex connects to your existing tools in under an hour. First metrics land within 7 days. No hourly-billed implementation consultant.

s1.title: Connect
s1.body: Your current tools (Harvest, Toggl, Jira, QuickBooks, spreadsheets) snap in via ready-made connectors. No API coding required.

s2.title: See
s2.body: Every project becomes a live card: actual vs budgeted hours, real-time margin, alerts when you slip below the waterline.

s3.title: Act
s3.body: Weekly decisions instead of monthly: re-scope a project at risk, renegotiate a deliverable, drop an unprofitable client. Before the loss, not after.

howItWorks.result_note: on projects tracked in Vertex, based on the Productive.io case study (ref S18) applied to our Quebec SMB cohort.

cta.title: Your next quarter can be profitable at the right moment.
cta.subtitle: Not at end-of-quarter review. This week. 2-minute demo, no commitment, no credit card.
cta.trust_line: 14-day free trial · No credit card · Human support in French & English

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: Vertex PMO is subject to Quebec's Act respecting the protection of personal information in the private sector (Law 25).
privacy.rpp_title: Head of Security and Privacy Officer
privacy.data_body: Name, business email, company, role, application usage data (projects, hours, budgets — client-owned), authentication logs.
privacy.purposes_body: Delivering the SaaS service, billing, customer support, product improvement on anonymized and aggregated data only.
privacy.retention_body: Customer data is retained throughout the contract + 90 days after termination (export window). Authentication logs are retained 12 months. Anonymized aggregated data may be kept indefinitely.
privacy.rights_body: You may at any time request access, rectification, deletion, or portability of your data by contacting our Privacy Officer. A maximum 30-day response time is respected.

mentions.title: Legal notices
